parameters.subject: We Value You – Special Offer Inside ✨ ✨ ✨ ✨
parameters.message:
=Dear {{$json.name}},

Thank you for being a valued customer. We’re excited to offer you an **exclusive, limited-time deal** created especially for you. ✨

Enjoy special benefits, added value, and priority perks designed to enhance your experience with us. 🚀

👉 Claim your offer here:
https://example.com/special-offer

⏳ Don’t miss out — this opportunity is available for a short time only.

Thank you for your continued support. 💙

Warm regards,
Customer Success Team
